'''Nek''', taking the name from the ferocious [[Nek/Legends|battle-dog]], was the name of a resistance member on [[Samaria/Legends|Samaria]]. She tried to help [[Ferus Olin]] by finding information about bribing ministers of Samaria by [[Bog Divinian]]. Nek, like her friends, was unsuccessful in doing so.

{{Char-stub}}

*''[[The Last of the Jedi: Return of the Dark Side]]'' {{1st}}
